visuals.title: How a Transaction is Added to the Blockchain
visuals.description: Visual diagram for How a Transaction is Added to the Blockchain
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Features and Applications of Blockchain</text>

  <!-- Central Blockchain Node -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="175" r="40" fill="#1565C0" stroke="#0D47A1" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="210" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Blockchain
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Feature: Decentralization -->
  <rect x="50" y="70" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Decentralization
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <line x1="150" y1="90" x2="170" y2="175" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>

  <!-- Feature: Immutability -->
  <rect x="270" y="70" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="320" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Immutability
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <line x1="270" y1="90" x2="190" y2="175" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>

  <!-- Feature: Transparency -->
  <rect x="50" y="250" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Transparency
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <line x1="150" y1="250" x2="170" y2="215" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>

  <!-- Feature: Security -->
  <rect x="270" y="250" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="320" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Security
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <line x1="270" y1="250" x2="190" y2="215" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>

  <!-- Application: Cryptocurrency -->
  <circle cx="100" cy="40" r="20" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="100" y="44" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Crypto
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Application: Smart Contracts -->
  <circle cx="320" cy="40" r="20" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="320" y="44" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Contracts
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Application: Supply Chain -->
  <circle cx="100" cy="310" r="20" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="100" y="314" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Supply
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Application: Healthcare -->
  <circle cx="320" cy="310" r="20" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="320" y="314" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Health
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>

diagrams.title: How a Transaction is Added to the Blockchain

nodes.label: Transaction is broadcast to P2P network
Valid transactions are grouped into a block
Winning block is added to the chain
Block is propagated, ledger updates for all nodes
